no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-a038a090 (Story 14: server coordinator + clients, federation/hub-spoke) is an
epic-sized container, not a single-attempt unit. Its acceptance criterion is "All child
beads closed" and the description points at /tmp/story-14-final.md, which lists 9 distinct
deliverables spanning ADR authoring, a new Go package, hub HTTP API + security policy,
spoke lifecycle, fan-out client, federated GraphQL schema, SvelteKit UI, backend chaos
suite, and Playwright e2e — well beyond a bounded-context attempt (>>500 LOC across many
unrelated packages).

Per execute-bead Step 0, this attempt decomposes rather than implements. Children created
and linked under ddx-a038a090 with `ddx bead dep add` to capture the dependency DAG from
the plan:

  B14.1  ddx-1d4bfbf3  ADR-007 + FEAT-026 frame + FEAT-020/021 amendments + naming
                       (deps: none)
  B14.2  ddx-1bbd1096  cli/internal/federation pkg: state types + persistence + schema_version
                       (deps: B14.1)
  B14.3  ddx-ab7f6184  Hub HTTP API + --hub-mode + ts-net policy + version handshake
                       (deps: B14.2)
  B14.4  ddx-238880c4  Spoke lifecycle: --hub=, idempotent register, jittered heartbeat,
                       URL-change, deregister
                       (deps: B14.3)
  B14.6a ddx-89bc2db4  Fan-out client/merger: timeout, max-concurrency, partial-result,
                       per-node errors
                       (deps: B14.3)
  B14.6b ddx-586d9431  Federated GraphQL: federationNodes, federatedBeads/Runs/Projects
                       + routing-metadata fields
                       (deps: B14.6a)
  B14.7  ddx-e869a89c  Frontend: /federation route + node-picker + ?scope=federation
                       + status badges
                       (deps: B14.6b)
  B14.8a ddx-13e19750  Backend chaos/integration suite (hub crash, stale spoke, dup reg,
                       newer schema, slow timeout, hub-restart-rebuild)
                       (deps: B14.6b)
  B14.8b ddx-e59bff83  Playwright e2e for 2-node federation + ts-net guard AC
                       (deps: B14.7, B14.8a)

Note: The plan numbers skip "B14.5" because the original B14.3+B14.5 were merged per
codex feedback ("route availability and hub-mode gating are one behavior"). B14.6a/b
intentionally split fan-out semantics from schema design. B14.8a/b split because backend
chaos and Playwright e2e have different infra needs and tier suggestions (strong vs
cheap-do + strong-review).

Parent bead notes field updated with the child id roster. No source-code changes in this
attempt; no commit produced. Subsequent execute-bead attempts will pick up B14.1 first
(it is the only child with no deps).
